stateJson.sprintGoal: 完成博客系统所有 API 接口实现并通过全部测试

atus.title: Implement Tag CRUD routes
atus.description: Implement all tag CRUD endpoints in routes_tag.py: POST /tags (create, 400/409 errors), GET /tags (list all), PUT /tags/<id> (update name, 400/404/409 errors), DELETE /tags/<id> (delete + cascade remove bindings). Blueprint: tag_bp. Response format: {status, data/message}.

history.action: Sprint 1 Round 1: Developer 实现完成，Tester 6/6 通过，Reviewer 审查通过

atus.title: Implement Article CRUD routes
atus.description: Implement article CRUD endpoints in routes_article.py: POST /articles (create, 400 if missing fields), GET /articles (list all), GET /articles/<id> (get single, 404). Blueprint: article_bp. Response format: {status, data}.

history.action: Sprint 1 Round 2: Developer 实现完成，Tester 4/4 通过，Reviewer 审查通过

atus.title: Implement Article-Tag binding routes
atus.description: Implement article-tag binding endpoints in routes_article.py: POST /articles/<id>/tags (bind tags by tag_ids), GET /articles/<id>/tags (list article's tags), DELETE /articles/<id>/tags/<tag_id> (unbind). Handle 404 for article not found.

history.action: Sprint 1 Round 3: Developer 实现完成，Tester 4/4 通过，Reviewer 审查通过

atus.title: Implement tag-based article filtering
atus.description: Add query parameter filtering to GET /articles: ?tag=<name> filters by tag name, ?tag_id=<id> filters by tag ID. Return empty list when no match. Works alongside existing GET /articles without filter.

history.action: Sprint 1 Round 4: Developer 实现完成，Tester 4/4 通过，Reviewer 审查通过
